notableEvents.label: Sung-Mun Song GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sung-Mun Song grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Ramón Laureano out at 2nd. Sung-Mun Song out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Sung-Mun Song rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sung-Mun Song grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Ramón Laureano out at 2nd. Sung-Mun Song out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Freddy Fermin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Freddy Fermin grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Sung-Mun Song out at 2nd. Freddy Fermin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Connor Joe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Connor Joe called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts singles on a soft ground ball to shortstop J.P. Crawford. Bryce Johnson to 3rd. Xander Bogaerts to 2nd. Bryce Johnson advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop J.P. Crawford.
